title: Quick Change
overview: Dorina is a transsexual woman. She’s got herself a ﬂourishing career, albeit in an illegal cosmetic surgery business. She is a mother ﬁgure to Hero, her eight year old nephew, and a devoted wife to Uno. Between her job and her family, Dorina feels that she is one lucky woman. Until Uno falls in love.
